title: Weighted Shortest Paths and Relaxation · Invariant Triage
summary: Choose safe routes across positive, negative, and unreachable weighted networks. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a multi-algorithm route engine with path proofs and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: State and apply edge relaxation while preserving predecessor evidence.
Run Dijkstra only under compatible nonnegative weights and stale-entry handling.
Use repeated relaxation to find shortest paths and reachable negative-cycle evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
